claim_support.reason: Material claims regarding 'year-over-year' revenue and net income growth (28.82% and 44.04%) are not supported by the cited calculation objects, which explicitly compare Q3 to Q2 (sequential quarters). The evidence supports Quarter-over-Quarter growth, making the 'year-over-year' claim unsupported and misleading.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Two severe numerical issues identified: 1) Growth rates are mislabeled as Year-over-Year (YoY) when the data and calculations confirm they are Quarter-over-Quarter (QoQ). 2) Conflicting one-year stock return figures are presented (254% in Recent Developments vs. 302.97% in Business & Competitive Analysis and Risk Analysis), with the 254% figure contradicting the cited calculation object (302.97%).

citation_precision.reason: In Recent Developments Paragraph 3, the text cites calculation object `96737a69` (which equals 302.97%) but reports the figure from a news snippet (254%) instead. While the news snippet is also cited, prioritizing the headline number over the structured calculation object reduces precision.

temporal_validity.reason: All evidence dates (news, filings) are on or before the report as-of date of 2025-11-12. No post-as-of claims were detected.

consistency.reason: Significant inconsistency in reported one-year stock returns (254% vs. 302.97%) across different sections. Additionally, the mislabeling of QoQ growth as YoY is consistent across sections but represents a consistent factual error.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe unsupported claims, numerical errors, inconsistencies.
